description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, glossy black metal head and a natural wood handle. The head has a dual-purpose design: one side is a flat striking face for driving nails, while the opposite side features a curved claw for prying and nail removal. The handle is straight, made from a single piece of wood with visible grain patterns, and tapers slightly towards the end for a comfortable grip. The metal head is securely attached to the handle, with no visible fasteners or joints. The overall finish is clean and polished, with no visible signs of wear or branding. This hammer is typical of those found in urban garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A classic claw hammer with a glossy black metal head and a straight wooden handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for prying.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and the flat striking face, as well as the wood grain on the handle.
description_view_1: Front view showing the width of the hammer head and the narrow profile of the handle, with the striking face directly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the hammer, with the claw and striking face visible, and the handle's wood texture.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the end of the handle, with the claw's curvature less pronounced.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with visible grain, smooth finish, and a slight taper towards the end.
attribute_head_type: Glossy black steel head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the other for prying.
